channel.title: Basics on David's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Basics on David's Blog

item.title: encoding/gob & encoding/json in golang
item.description: 1. why do we need encoding To transmit a data structure across a network or to store it in a file, it must be encoded and then decoded again. Cause computer just know binary. There are many encodings available, of course: JSON, XML, Google’s protocol buffers, and more. And now there’s another, provided by Go’
